input.prompt: Funnel chart for roxabi-boilerplate SaaS signup conversion: Visitors (12400), Signups started (3100), Email verified (2240), Onboarding completed (1580), First paid action (620), Active subscriber (310). Show drop-off percentage between each stage.

notes: funnel template with 6 conversion stages; exercises trapezoid stage geometry, drop-off percentage annotations between stages, and value labels inside each band.
